---
title: "ch6"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
      collapsed: false
    df_print: "paged"
    highlight: pygments
    # theme: lumen
    md_extensions: -ascii_identifiers
    css: "template/style_ch.css"
    includes:
      in_header: "template/head.html"
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

# packages
library(plotly)
library(broom)
# library(pander)
library(knitr)
```

## データの読込み

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
data <- read.csv("data2/職場データ.csv")
head(data)
```


```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# 6.1.1
data$work2.m <- ave(data$work1, data$company)
data$work1.cwc <- data$work1 - data$work2.m

# 6.1.2
data$work1.cgm <- data$work1 - mean(data$work1)

# 6.2.1
data$hap2.m <- ave(data$hap1, data$company)

head(data)
```
